first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (3/10) and disqualify the candidate for the same primary, job-relevant reason: the stated 'Basic' German proficiency does not meet the mandatory C1 requirement. The minor differences in wording for the justification, strengths, and concerns are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment.
